title: Runtime Skills Manifest (per-repo APP-layer)
description: Declares which skills the DEPLOYED app injects into its Claude API calls at runtime. EX-2: populated LAST, after app fundamentals are green. EX-3: every skill must have passing external eval before listing here.

oneOf.description: App has no runtime skill injection (e.g., static site, pure CRUD)

eval_score.description: Composite eval score per SOP-25; must be ≥92 to inject

eval_evidence_path.description: Path to eval report in smorch-brain/skills/{skill-id}/evals/

injection_path.description: Where in app code the skill is injected (e.g., src/lib/claude/skills/)

triggers.description: User journeys or event types that invoke this skill
